name: Sloppy Joes -s
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet or pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
2. Add the minced onions and green peppers to the pan.
3. Cook until the vegetables are translucent, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Add the seitan cubes (or ground) to the pan.
5. Stir in approximately 2 cups of tomato sauce.
6. Simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Serve on whole wheat buns with baked beans and coleslaw, or as a sauce over brown rice.
Per serving: Calories: 117, Protein: 21 gm., Carbohydrates: 11 gm., Fat: 1.5 gm.
